title: potentilla × arenicola
intro: Potentilla × arenicola, also known as Arenaria × potentiila or Silver-leaved Cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Potentilla and Arenaria. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × arenicola include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves and flowers are often used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
